original_image_tags: A handwritten note in red pencil next to the subject line reads "Flying Saucers".
A red circular stamp with handwritten initials "D" and text "ALL INFORMATION CONTAINED HEREIN IS UNCLASSIFIED DATE 5/7/85" signed "P. [illegible]".
A red stamp with "9 APR 26 1960" over "JFW:tp (6)".
A handwritten note in the bottom margin reads "[illegible] good".
A handwritten note in the bottom right margin with initials "[illegible] xgr [illegible]".

elements.description: A single page consisting entirely of typed text, handwritten annotations, and rubber stamps. There are no photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, charts, newspaper illustrations, or other visual graphical elements present.

judge.reason: Description A lists specific visual elements (handwritten notes, stamps) while Description B claims there are no visual graphical elements, directly contradicting the presence of stamps and annotations.
